package rulefixtures

// scenario for rand_new_per_call: `rand.New(...)` inside regular call paths instead of reusing a generator.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule624PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario624Positive(records []Rule624PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
